data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Version control and change tracking' as specified in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation or functionality of version control and change tracking features. The absence of any related evidence indicates a clear gap in meeting this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of version control and change tracking functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
